nearme-desc: Location-based page discovery using Cargo coordinate fields (NearbyPages-style).
nearme-info-description: Find Saintapedia pages near your current location or a set of coordinates.
nearme-requirements-guidance: Nearby requires JavaScript and geolocation support in your browser.
nearme-error-guidance: Please try again, or enter coordinates manually in the URL: Special:Nearby#/coord/lat,lon
nearme-noresults-guidance: Try increasing the search radius in LocalSettings.php ($wgNearMeDefaultRadius) or move to a different location.
nearme-location-unavailable: Your location could not be determined.
nearme-permission-denied: Location permission was denied. Enable location access in your browser to use this feature.
nearme-error-cargo-missing: The Cargo extension must be installed and enabled before NearMe can run.
nearme-error-no-sources: No Cargo tables are configured for NearMe. Set $wgNearMeTables in LocalSettings.php.
apihelp-cargonearby-summary: Search Cargo tables for rows near a geographic coordinate.
apihelp-cargonearby-param-gscoord: Latitude and longitude separated by a pipe (e.g. 40.44|-79.99).
apihelp-cargonearby-param-table: Optional Cargo table name to restrict the search.
